results.title: Fashion editor's pick of flattering tummy control swimsuits on the high street
results.description: Whether you're heading to the beach or lounging in your garden, these are the most flattering swimsuit options on the high street right now

results.title: Dame Jools Topp dies aged 68: Dame Lynda shares twin’s final message to fans
results.description: Dame Lynda Topp has shared her twin sister Jools Topp’s final message of thanks to Kiwis.

results.title: ‘Not learnt their lessons’: SC seeks response from Centre, NTA on NEET paper leak
results.description: The bench of Justices PS Narasimha and Alok Aradhe heard various pleas urging for measures relating to the replacement of the NTA and shifting NEET to a computer-based format.

results.title: Massive and made of fiberglass, Muffler Men are a Route 66 classic — and they're multiplying
results.description: The snow was flying sideways and he had no jacket, but this lumberjack did not shiver. He stood about 25 feet tall, ax in hand, wearing a red hat and rictus grin. And he was made of fiberglass.

results.title: Leyla Aliyeva meets women engaged in mat weaving in Masally
results.description: During her visit to the Masally district, the Vice-President of the Heydar Aliyev Foundation and founder and head of the IDEA Public Union, Leyla Aliyeva, met with women engaged in traditional mat weaving in the village of Musakucha, AzerNEWS reports.

results.title: Tartu scientists map how genes affect metabolism
results.description: Researchers at the University of Tartu have mapped how genes influence human metabolism using data from more than half a million people. The large-scale study gives scientists a more precise picture of the causes of disease and could help speed up drug development.
